title: papaver somniferum convar. opiiferum
intro: Papaver somniferum convar. opiiferum, commonly known as the opium poppy, is a subspecies of the opium poppy plant (Papaver somniferum) that is specifically bred for its high opium content. The medicinal properties of Papaver somniferum convar. opiiferum are derived from its opium latex, which contains alkaloids such as morphine, codeine, and thebaine, making it a valuable plant for the production of pain-relieving medications. The health benefits of Papaver somniferum convar. opiiferum include its analgesic and antispasmodic properties, which can help alleviate pain and reduce inflammation, as well as its use in treating coughs and respiratory issues. Papaver somniferum convar. opiiferum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including extracts, tinctures, and capsules, although its cultivation and use are heavily regulated due to its potential for abuse and addiction.
